message:
feat(extensions): add set_label session op + dispatcher test expansion

Extend the extension dispatcher to support the set_label session
operation, allowing JS extensions to rename sessions/branches via
pi.session("set_label", { targetId, label }).

Changes:
- New "set_label"/"setlabel" match arm in dispatch_session_op: extracts
  targetId (or target_id) and label from JSON payload, calls
  session.set_label()
- TestSession gains labels: Arc<Mutex<Vec<(String, Option<String>)>>>
  field to record set_label calls in tests
- All TestSession construction sites updated with labels field
- New tests:
  - dispatcher_session_set_label_resolves_and_persists: verifies JS
    set_label call reaches session and resolves the promise
  - dispatcher_session_get_file_isolated: tests get_file returns path
  - dispatcher_session_get_name_isolated: tests get_name returns name
  - dispatcher_session_append_entry_custom_type_edge_cases: tests
    snake_case custom_type key variant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
